description: Forgejo is free, self-hosted software forge platform for hosting Git repositories and collaborating on software development. Organizations can run their own Forgejo instances, which provide web UI, API, and administrative tooling.
summary: Forgejo exposes a self-hosted HTTP API documented on forgejo.org and a local `forgejo` CLI for server administration; no GraphQL, MCP server, or forgejo.org-hosted public API endpoint was identified.

packages.runtimeHint: install from Forgejo release binaries or OS packages
